default: I'll summarise what matters and point you to examples — not a wall of links.
Let me explain what's happening in sustainability and how it could help your site.
overview: Cheryce here — I connect headlines to practical next steps: news, map inspiration, videos, and price context.
Ask me anything; I'll keep the chat friendly and put editions and tools on the right.
monthly_news: Here's what stands out in the latest roundup — why it matters, not every headline at once.
I'll highlight a few stories; open the cards on the right for full editions.
sustainability_map: Here's what the sustainability map is for — examples are on the right.
sustainability_map_explained: Let me walk you through what the sustainability map is — headline examples above, more on the right.
The map is inspiration from real companies worldwide — I'll explain how to use it, then you can open the full atlas when ready.
energy_examples: Real kWh and payback benchmarks from the map — useful when you're comparing upgrades.
I'll explain what the numbers mean; open the example cards for the full story.
energy_prices: Wholesale moves change how fast upgrades pay back — here's the ticker context in plain language.
I pair price headlines with the live ticker; ask if you want unit-rate jargon explained.
how_this_helps: Every story has a 'why it matters' layer — bills, compliance, or timing for your upgrades.
Tell me your sector if you want that translated for restaurants, SMEs, or hospitality.
wix_videos: Videos by topic — kitchen, home energy, water, building — I'll match your sector when I can.
Tap ▶ on a card to watch; ask me to explain anything in the video topic.
role_resources: These newsletters and map data shape how I curate — I summarise; full editions are on the right.
Open an edition when you need every story, not just chat highlights.

products: Product angles in the news — **Zyanne** searches the efficient-product catalog.
**Zyanne** finds marketplace equipment tied to stories you read here.
finance: Ticker moved — **Vincent** models payback on your upgrade shortlist.
**Vincent** ties wholesale prices to finance and unit-cost impact.
grants: Funding headlines need scheme detail — **Andrieus** confirms eligibility.
**Andrieus** owns grants when policy news names a programme.
deals: Tariff spotlights live with **Zara** when prices shift.
**Zara** curates offers that make acting on news easier.
equipment: Kitchen or HVAC case studies — **Artemis** on ETL fit and lifecycle.
**Artemis** deep-dives equipment behind map savings figures.
